data.command: export PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$HOME/bin:$PATH" && gt prime --hook && gt mail check --inject

message.content:
[GAS TOWN] deacon <- daemon • 2026-02-23T09:45 • patrol

I am Deacon. Start patrol: run gt deacon heartbeat, then check gt hook. If no hook, create mol-deacon-patrol wisp and execute it.

content.thinking:
Deacon checking in. I have work hooked - `skogtown-wisp-wisp-0r0s1f`. Let me follow the protocol:

1. Update heartbeat
2. Check the hooked work (already shown - it's the patrol wisp)
3. Execute it

Let me start by running the heartbeat and checking the current mol step.
